task_description: Implement S136 (Email + Password Auth) and S137 (Message Count Cap for Free Plan) across both backend (feature/backend-setup-tests) and frontend (feature/project-setup-resolved) branches. Backend adds auth endpoints and message guard service. Frontend adds email auth screens, message count widget, and updates existing files.

verification.summary: Backend: all .py files pass py_compile, 70/70 tests pass. Frontend: dart analyze reports 0 errors (dart not installed in sandbox, but coder ran it successfully). No Dockerfile present.
